metadata.title: Quantum Tunneling Wave Packet with Claude
_variant_todo: rewrite every beat narration_text in the Teardown register (voices/teardown/VOICE.md + CLAUDE-BRAND.md) — voice only, facts unchanged
signature tangent 0-1 per video, ONLY on a clear opportunity (see SKILL)
swap the outro to the Claude outro from AUTHOR.MD :: NikBearBrown
then build audience-namespaced (audio in the new voice, scenes in the new palette)

skin_warnings: B00: palette=claude but the cold open is 'un-annotated' — COLD OPEN LAW wants ClaudeComposerAsk
B09: palette=claude but the outro is 'un-annotated' — OUTRO LAW wants ClaudeTitleOutro

beats.narration_text: Yo. This is Liam, in for Bear. One Claude prompt. A live interactive simulation of crank-nicolson tdse 512pt.
Quantum mechanics is full of non-obvious results. Today's: Crank-Nicolson TDSE 512pt. Key checkable number: analytic T readout. Let us build the demonstration.

build.suggested: suggested prompt: Quantum mechanics is full of non-obvious results. Today's: Crank-Nicolson TDSE 512pt. Key checkable number: analytic T readout. Let us build the demonstration.

props.prompt: Build me an interactive D3 simulation of crank-nicolson tdse 512pt. Use D3 version 7 from CDN. Single-file HTML, all physics computed in-browser JavaScript. Add at least one slider or control. Teardown palette: background #FFFFFF, ink #2A1A0E, accent #C8102E.

beats.narration_text: Claude returns a single-file HTML. D3 version 7. All the physics runs in the browser. No server. No build step.

build.suggested: suggested prompt: Claude returns a single-file HTML. D3 version 7. All the physics runs in the browser. No server. No build step.

beats.narration_text: Here is the baseline — the simulation at rest. Crank-Nicolson TDSE 512pt.

build.suggested: suggested prompt: Here is the baseline — the simulation at rest. Crank-Nicolson TDSE 512pt.

beats.narration_text: Now interact with the control — drag the slider, click the toggle. Watch the physics respond.

build.suggested: suggested prompt: Now interact with the control — drag the slider, click the toggle. Watch the physics respond.

beats.narration_text: The simulation updates in real time. analytic T readout. Exactly as the equations predict.

build.suggested: suggested prompt: The simulation updates in real time. analytic T readout. Exactly as the equations predict.

beats.narration_text: One prompt. A live quantum mechanics demonstration. Crank-Nicolson TDSE 512pt. Bear reviews these in the morning and ships the ones that pass.

build.suggested: suggested prompt: One prompt. A live quantum mechanics demonstration. Crank-Nicolson TDSE 512pt. Bear reviews these in the morning and ships the ones that pass.

beats.narration_text: Your turn. Extend this 11 tunneling wave packet simulation. Add a second control that changes [parameter]. Show how it affects the result.
